creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yesterday, a new version of snort was released: 3.1.12.0

I was able to patch snort, with bapt@'s help, and get it to compile: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/diff/security/snort3/files/patch-src_control_control.h?id=fb0f6cdfd018b7f9ca2fc2a10ddf6dc25b771077

This was worked on yesterday. I did not acknowledge this PR in the commits. I forgot the PR existed.

net/libdaq was updated (needed for new snort3 version):

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=569ce8268e0c4f8106559aaf3df6787c248c1664


security/snort3:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=fb0f6cdfd018b7f9ca2fc2a10ddf6dc25b771077
